reference: BUT SINCE THIS IS NOT THE CASE AND ON THE CONTRARY MEN IN POWER ARE ALWAYS FAR FROM BEING SAINTS THROUGH THE VERY FACT OF THEIR POSSESSION OF POWER THE SOCIAL ORGANIZATION BASED ON POWER HAS NO JUSTIFICATION
text: But since this is not the case, and on the contrary, men in power are always far from being saints, through the very fact of their possession of power, the social organization based on power has no justification.
